pageCaption.value: In a first-of-its-kind association, Condé Nast Traveller India partnered with Rolex to shine a light on Rolex's Perpetual Planet initiative.

metadescription.value: In a first-of-its-kind associations, Condé Nast Traveller India partnered with Rolex to shine a light on Rolex's Perpetual Planet initiative. Discover more on rolex.org.

text.value:
In a first-of-its-kind association, Condé Nast Traveller India partnered with Rolex to shine a light on Rolex's Perpetual Planet initiative.

From highlighting Mission Blue's inspiring work establishing Hope Spots around the world to leveraging the importance of marine conservation in sensitive areas, the partnership worked to put the spotlight on incredible projects, people, and places working to protect our oceans.

pageTitle.value: Rolex Partnerships - Saving the oceans, one spot at a time

pageCaption.value: Backed by Rolex, the Mission Blue initiative by Sylvia Earle is giving new life to sensitive parts of the marine world.
